recipient.name: United Nations Foundation
recipient.claim_boundary: Recipient only. No UN/United Nations Foundation partnership, endorsement, certification, authorization, or official relationship may be implied.

public_proof_policy.withheld_use: Allowed only as an approved privacy/safety exception; withheld proof records must not be used for trust badge or high-amplification claims.

operator_decisions.redaction_standard: Sensitive fields must be redacted. No redaction is allowed only when a receipt/proof contains no sensitive fields after reviewer inspection.
operator_decisions.proof_storage_strategy: Original receipt in private disk/bucket; redacted public proof in separate public-safe media path or signed public URL after review; admin-only signed URL for private proof if needed.
operator_decisions.public_record_allowed: only after record exists and proof gate passes
operator_decisions.social_sync: operator begins social videos/images today, but only with safe factual language and no trust badge/official endorsement claims
